description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- All Tools Page - New “All Tools” category in the Tools sidebar shows every tool grouped by category in a card layout with search filtering
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Group Report: Members Column - Members column now available in the column picker for all group reports, showing a semicolon-separated list of member names
- Bulk Update Users - Added support for preferredName attribute; memberOf now recognized as a CSV header alias for the Member Of column
